content: Voglio scoprire se Tom indosserà la maglietta che gli ho regalato.
credits: Sentence from Tatoeba by valealb (CC-BY 2.0 FR)
relationships: eng:I want to find out if Tom is going to wear the new shirt I gave him
eng:I want to find out if Tom is going to wear the new shirt that I gave him
tur:Tom'un ona verdiğim yeni gömleği giyip giymeyeceğini öğrenmek istiyorum
